Report.Name: Demand Forecast - Company - Chart
Report.Description: Gráfico de Demand Forecast por empresa

With.Name: Main
With.Query: SELECT CompanyDemandForecast.[Week] AS [Week], {{ IfRequest -Expression: TotalStock --SUM(CompanyDemandForecast.AccumulatedReceptions + CompanyDemandForecast.Receptions + --CompanyDemandForecast.SimulatedReceptions + CompanyDemandForecast.Stock) AS TotalStock -Expression: Stock --SUM(CompanyDemandForecast.Stock) AS Stock -Expression: AccumulatedReceptions --SUM(CompanyDemandForecast.AccumulatedReceptions) AS AccumulatedReceptions -Expression: Receptions --SUM(CompanyDemandForecast.Receptions) AS Receptions -Expression: Sales --SUM(CompanyDemandForecast.Sales) AS Sales -Expression: Breakage --SUM(CompanyDemandForecast.Breakage) AS Breakage -Expression: SimulatedReceptions --SUM(CompanyDemandForecast.SimulatedReceptions) AS SimulatedReceptions -Expression: PointOfSaleDeliveries --SUM(CompanyDemandForecast.PointOfSaleDeliveries) AS PointOfSaleDeliveries -Expression: Orders --SUM(CompanyDemandForecast.Orders) AS Orders -Expression: OrdersAdjustedToMinimumAndMultiple --SUM(CompanyDemandForecast.OrdersAdjustedToMinimumAndMultiple) AS OrdersAdjustedToMinimumAndMultiple -Expression: OrdersAdjustedToCapacity --SUM(CompanyDemandForecast.OrdersAdjustedToCapacity) AS OrdersAdjustedToCapacity -Expression: OrdersAdjustedToCapacityAdvance --SUM(CompanyDemandForecast.OrdersAdjustedToCapacityAdvance) AS OrdersAdjustedToCapacityAdvance -Expression: Capacity --SUM(CompanyDemandForecast.Capacity) AS Capacity -Expression: AccumulatedSales --SUM(CompanyDemandForecast.AccumulatedSales) AS AccumulatedSales -Expression: AccumulatedPointOfSalesDeliveries --SUM(CompanyDemandForecast.AccumulatedPointOfSalesDeliveries) AS AccumulatedPointOfSalesDeliveries -Expression: AccumulatedOrders --SUM(CompanyDemandForecast.AccumulatedOrders) AS AccumulatedOrders -Expression: AccumulatedOrdersAdjustedToMinimunAndMultiple --SUM(CompanyDemandForecast.AccumulatedOrdersAdjustedToMinimunAndMultiple) AS AccumulatedOrdersAdjustedToMinimunAndMultiple -Expression: AccumulatedOrdersAdjustedToCapacity --SUM(CompanyDemandForecast.AccumulatedOrdersAdjustedToCapacity) AS AccumulatedOrdersAdjustedToCapacity -Expression: AccumulatedOrdersAdjustedToCapacityAdvance --SUM(CompanyDemandForecast.AccumulatedOrdersAdjustedToCapacityAdvance) AS AccumulatedOrdersAdjustedToCapacityAdvance }} FROM Fact.CompanyDemandForecast {{ InnerJoin -Dimension: Products --Table: ProductsCte -Table: CompanyDemandForecast -On: ProductId-ProductId }} GROUP BY CompanyDemandForecast.[Week] ORDER BY CompanyDemandForecast.[Week]
